# Named postmortem template

```yaml
video_asset_code:
experiment_code:
hypothesis_id:
scientific_name:
method_code:
date_posted:
platform:
surface:

results:
  24h:
  72h:
  7d:
  30d:

primary_metric_result:
guardrail_results:

diagnosis:
  failed_gate:
  likely_reason:
  comment_themes:
  search_terms:
  audience_fit:

decision:
  scale | iterate | kill | replicate

next_variant:
```
